executive_summary: Closes the operator-absence gap (roadmap X3/X4): what happens to in-flight work when the one human is unavailable or swamped. Machine-continuity (orphan-adoption, auto-push-WIP, reaper-guard, DR rehearsal, decision-queue) is ~80% shipped; the remaining gaps are governance + existential. This SD delivers: (1) a documented chairman-away gate policy for the live-true KILL/PROMOTION gates (safe standing default where not-acting is strictly safe, else hold-and-surface; NO auto-override — no-auto-override doctrine preserved; DRAFT for chairman ratification); (2) a one-page only-the-chairman-can dependency map including harness-level incident diagnosis (G6); (3) an Anthropic-cap/model-availability contingency (G4) that reuses the live llm_canary_state substrate to detect degradation + a documented fallback ladder (single-session → model-fallback → pause-and-surface/degraded-safe-mode); (4) a launch-spike rehearsal against seeded load + one breakage with a PRE-REGISTERED chairman touch-count ceiling and a degraded-safe-mode (freeze new work / hold intake / surface). It explicitly does NOT delegate chairman authority, build a support pipeline, or build a standby operator.

functional_requirements.title: Chairman-away gate policy (DRAFT for ratification)
functional_requirements.description: docs/03_protocols_and_standards/chairman-away-gate-policy.md: per live-true KILL/PROMOTION gate (7 venture gates from stage-gates.js + LEAD-FINAL), a SAFE standing default where not-acting is strictly safe (KILL gates: no auto-kill, venture waits) else HOLD-AND-SURFACE (PROMOTION + pre-launch KILL + chairman-required SD-ship). Default-to-hold rule; degraded-safe-mode forces all gates to hold; NO chairman-authority delegation. Notes the 11-vs-7-vs-5 gate-count ambiguity (prd-ambiguous 9d4d8351).
acceptance_criteria: every live KILL/PROMOTION gate has a documented away-behavior
no gate auto-overrides the chairman (no-auto-override preserved)
ambiguity in the gate inventory resolves to hold

functional_requirements.title: Only-the-chairman-can dependency map
functional_requirements.description: docs/03_protocols_and_standards/only-the-chairman-can.md: the bounded non-delegable acts (hard-kill, scale promotion, venture-pick, gate-binding flip, fleet-migration approval, WEDGED-HARNESS diagnosis G6, spend/legal, doctrine-override) + their away-behavior. Frames the goal as survivable absence, not autonomous authority.
acceptance_criteria: the map explicitly includes harness-level incident diagnosis (G6)
nothing on the list is auto-resolved by an agent

functional_requirements.title: Anthropic-cap contingency: detector + fallback ladder
functional_requirements.description: scripts/continuity/llm-degradation-detector.mjs (PURE source-agnostic evaluateDegradationRung → rung NORMAL/SINGLE_SESSION/MODEL_FALLBACK/PAUSE_AND_SURFACE; detectFromDb read-only, fail-open, writes nothing) + docs/.../anthropic-cap-contingency.md (documented ladder: single-session → model-fallback[non-Anthropic] → pause-and-surface). ADDRESSES G4: ships the evaluator + documented ladder + rehearsal; the LIVE cloud-health feeder (stamps error_rate/latency/liveness from real Anthropic 429/5xx outcomes) is a NAMED DEFERRED follow-up — the live llm_canary_state is the dormant local-rollout canary, so detectFromDb reads NORMAL in prod today (disclosed in the doc). status='rolled_back' is NOT treated as degradation (inverted on that substrate); consecutive_failures only counts while status='rolling' (no stale-singleton false-pause).
acceptance_criteria: detector maps signals to the correct rung with explicit precedence
fail-direction: all-unknown/never-probed → NORMAL (no false freeze); only definite signals from an active probe degrade
pause-and-surface is the documented floor (never silent-fail)
the local-rollout-canary repurpose limitation + the deferred live feeder are explicitly disclosed (no G4-closure overclaim)

functional_requirements.title: Launch-spike rehearsal + runbook
functional_requirements.description: scripts/continuity/spike-rehearsal.mjs (pure runRehearsal: seeded intake + 1 breakage → asserts PAUSE_AND_SURFACE/degraded-safe-mode freeze+hold+surface within a PRE-REGISTERED chairman touch-count ceiling; seeded fixtures, dry-run, idempotent, no support-pipeline dep [G9], ceiling is an INPUT [G15]) + docs/.../spike-rehearsal-runbook.md + npm continuity:spike-rehearsal.
acceptance_criteria: rehearsal reaches degraded-safe-mode + freezes work + holds all intake
chairman touches <= the pre-registered ceiling AND do not scale with spike size
dry-run-able + idempotent + no serial dependency on the deferred support pipeline

functional_requirements.title: Tests
functional_requirements.description: tests/unit/llm-degradation-detector.test.js (12) + tests/unit/spike-rehearsal.test.js (4): every rung boundary, precedence, recovery, fail-safe, the rolled_back=NOT-degradation case, and the stale-singleton no-false-pause guard; rehearsal pass + ceiling-exceeded-fail + touch-count-does-not-scale.
acceptance_criteria: rung boundaries + precedence + fail-direction + stale-singleton guard covered

technical_requirements.title: No chairman-authority delegation
technical_requirements.description: Every gate either has a SAFE inaction default or holds-and-surfaces; nothing auto-decides a chairman-reserved act. The detector/rehearsal are read-only/pure (no chairman-reserved mutation).

technical_requirements.title: Reuse the live canary substrate
technical_requirements.description: Detection reads the existing llm_canary_state / llm_canary_transitions (migration 20260206) — no new table; documented as a repurpose.

technical_requirements.title: Out of scope
technical_requirements.description: No automated support pipeline (Phase 2), no standby second operator, no capacity auto-scaling, no flipping any gate to binding.

test_scenarios.scenario: Rehearsal reaches degraded-safe-mode within the pre-registered ceiling; fails if ceiling exceeded; touches don't scale
Away-gate policy + dependency map document every gate/act with an away-behavior
test_scenarios.expected: no gate/act without a documented away-behavior

acceptance_criteria: Documented chairman-away gate policy (no auto-override) + only-the-chairman-can map (incl. G6) + Anthropic-cap contingency: source-agnostic detector + documented fallback ladder (ADDRESSES G4; live cloud-health feeder explicitly deferred, not overclaimed) + a seeded launch-spike rehearsal with a pre-registered touch ceiling (G9/G15)
16 unit tests pass; rehearsal dry-run PASSES

No chairman-authority delegation; advisory-only (no automatic gate override); adversarial review of the rung logic + safe-defaults + rehearsal criteria resolved (inverted rolled_back trigger dropped, stale-singleton false-pause guarded, doc overclaims corrected)

risks.risk: The detector cannot observe a real Anthropic outage as-wired — the live llm_canary_state is the dormant local-rollout canary with no writer, so detectFromDb reads NORMAL in prod
risks.mitigation: EXPLICITLY DISCLOSED in anthropic-cap-contingency.md (Current limitation) and FR-3 — this SD ships the source-agnostic evaluator + documented ladder + rehearsal; the live cloud-health feeder (stamps signals from real Anthropic 429/5xx) is a NAMED DEFERRED follow-up. G4 is mitigated by the documented ladder + away-gate policy (operator-walked), not by automatic detection. No G4-closure overclaim.
all-unknown→NORMAL fail-open; degrade only on definite signals; unit tests pin the boundaries; pause requires consecutive_failures>=limit or rolled_back.

risks.risk: A safe-default secretly delegates a chairman decision
risks.mitigation: Default-to-hold rule; KILL gates default to inaction (no auto-kill); review's away-policy-safety lens; explicitly a DRAFT for chairman ratification.

consumers: scripts/continuity/spike-rehearsal.mjs + the runbook consume the detector
the away-gate policy + dependency map are governance docs the chairman ratifies
data_contracts: read-only on llm_canary_state; no schema change; no chairman-reserved writes
runtime_config: canary thresholds (error_rate_threshold, latency_multiplier_threshold, failures_before_rollback) stay in the canary row; pre-registered touch ceiling is a rehearsal input
observability_rollout: npm continuity:spike-rehearsal (dry-run PASS/FAIL); detector returns a rung+reason for any consumer

system_architecture.summary: Governance docs (away-policy + dependency map) + a pure read-only degradation detector over the live canary substrate + a seeded dry-run rehearsal proving degraded-safe-mode within a pre-registered touch ceiling.

implementation_approach.summary: Document the governance policy + dependency map; build a pure read-only degradation detector over the live canary substrate + a documented fallback ladder; prove it with a seeded, ceiling-bounded dry-run rehearsal; adversarially review the rung logic + safe-defaults + rehearsal criteria.
steps: PRD → adversarial review → fix → handoffs → LFA

smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: PASS — degraded-safe-mode reached, chairmanTouches=1 within ceiling

smoke_test_steps.instruction: Review the 4 docs in docs/03_protocols_and_standards/ (away-policy, only-the-chairman-can, anthropic-cap-contingency, spike-rehearsal-runbook)
smoke_test_steps.expected_outcome: every live gate + non-delegable act has a documented away-behavior; no auto-override
